title: Velika Gorica, Zagreb County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Velika Gorica, Zagreb County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Velika Gorica is a city in Zagreb County with a population of 31,000. A growing city near Zagreb, home to Croatia’s main international airport, with a historic old town, the Turopolje region, and a strong commuter economy.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
